title: High Molecular Weight DNA Extraction from Tunicates
author: Marta Wawrzyniak
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b5axq2fn

steps.title: Clean the slide from which you...
steps.instruction: Clean the slide from which you will take the colony of your interest. See Cleaning colonial ascidians .

steps.title: Isolate a cleaned colony composed of approx
steps.instruction: Isolate a cleaned colony composed of approx. 20-30 zooids.

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 4 µL of Proteinase K and mix by vortexing
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL of Proteinase K and mix by vortexing.

steps.title: Transfer to a 2 mL tube...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a 2 mL tube and spin at maximum speed for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Homogenize the sample in 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the sample in 500 µL of TE buffer using a sterile plastic pestle.

steps.title: Remove the excess water
steps.instruction: Remove the excess water.

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Add 1 mL of phenol and...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of phenol and mix well by inverting the tube until the phases are completely mixed.

steps.title: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for 00:05:00 and carefully transfer the 500 µL of the upper phase to a new 2 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of (1:1 v/v)...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of (1:1 v/v) phenol/chloroform and mix well by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for 00:05:00 and carefully collect the 300 µL of upper phase to a new 2 mL tube.

steps.title: Precipitate the DNA by addition of...
steps.instruction: Precipitate the DNA by addition of 30 µL 3 M sodium acetate and 600 µL of ethanol. Mix gently by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for 00:03:00 to pellet nucleic acids and carefully remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash in 1 mL cold ethanol...
steps.instruction: Wash in 1 mL cold ethanol ( -20 °C ) and invert gently several times.

steps.title: Carefully remove and discard supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard supernatant and place the tube up-side-down on a paper towel for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet gently in RNase-free...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet gently in RNase-free water at 37 °C for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Add 500 µL of SDS and...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of SDS and 4 µL of RNase and mix by vortexing.

steps.title: Quantify the DNA concentration and quality
steps.instruction: Quantify the DNA concentration and quality.

steps.title: Store at -20 °C or -80 °C (for longer storage)
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C or -80 °C (for longer storage).

steps.title: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 10000 rcf, °C, for 00:02:00 .
